title: Vivi Tries to Stop the War
description: On pages 4–7, this part focuses on vivi tries to stop the war, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: Vivi Tries to Stop the War. The rebellion and royal army rush toward Alubarna as Vivi’s group searches for a way to stop the war before it starts. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Hahaha! I don't know who you are,

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: But you look like one of their pals! Go find the key if you can!

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: But... I can't guarantee you'll have the time to search for it leisurely!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That bastard...

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Whoa, that guy's brain works fast!

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: sanji, we don't have any more time!

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Some of a...

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: SANJI, WAIT!

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: I think it just might be possible,

dialogue.speaker: Chaka
dialogue.text: For Mr. 3 to create a duplicate key for us using his Dora Dora power...

dialogue.speaker: Pell
dialogue.text: Crex...

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Oh, pretty good, Candle-man.

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Eheheh.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Aww, shucks.

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: Let's hurry!

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: I think the underwater passage they were planning to walk through is the way to Alabama!

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: But the problem is it's still blocked by all those bananas!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Army soldier
dialogue.text: ...I don't think we need to worry about that anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hahhh! Any more left that wants a piece of me!?

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: Pammit, I can't use all of my power with all this water around!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: even running away from one of those gave me so much trouble...

dialogue.speaker: King Cobra
dialogue.text: Don't beat yourself up, Vivi! It's these guys that are weird for being stupidly strong!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aghhh! The wall just crumbled!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: It's your fault for going overboard against the crocs!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The under- water passage collapsed too!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Run! Run through the other exit!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Aghhh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: gyaa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: usop's hit his head on a rock!

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: You alive, Luffy?

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: You devil fruit users are a real pain in the ass...

dialogue.speaker: Alabasta rebel
dialogue.text: Pfft!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Usopp! Please hang in there!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: For god's sake! Wake up and swim on your own, you doofus!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: ...Phah!...Phah!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Gasp!

summary: This part develops vivi tries to stop the war and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
